revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:4 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:4月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 4월 21일]][[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:四月廿一]][[zh:四月廿一]]
{{Not to be confused with|April 21|qq=April 21}} <!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=四月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 4월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar April|qq=}} '''April 21''' is the 21st day of the month {{ill|April (Lunisolar)|ja|4月 (旧暦)|lt=April (Uzuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/April (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 4th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11635368}}. == Events == * {{ill|Chōryaku|en|Chōryaku|qid=Q1193519|lt=Chōryaku|1=Chōryaku}} 1st year ({{Julian calendar|qq=}} {{ill|1037|en|1037|qid=Q19335|lt=1037|1=1037}} {{ill|May 9|en|May 9|qid=Q2556|lt=May 9|1=May 9}}) – Era name changed from {{ill|Chōgen|en|Chōgen|qid=Q1193557|lt=Chōgen|1=Chōgen}} to Chōryaku. * {{ill|Jōan (era)|en|Jōan (era)|qid=Q1194188|lt=承安|1=Jōan (era)}} 1st year ({{Julian calendar|qq=}} {{ill|1171|en|1171|qid=Q19685|lt=1171|1=1171}} {{ill|May 27|en|May 27|qid=Q2587|lt=May 27|1=May 27}}) – Era name changed from [[:en:嘉応|嘉応]] to Jōan. * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 11th year ({{Gregorian calendar|qq=}} {{ill|1583|en|1583|qid=Q6726|lt=1583|1=1583}} {{ill|June 11|en|June 11|qid=Q2617|lt=June 11|1=June 11}}) – At the {{ill|Battle of Shizugatake|en|Battle of Shizugatake|qid=Q225562|lt=Battle of Shizugatake|1=Battle of Shizugatake}}, [[柴田勝家]] was defeated by [[:en:豊臣秀吉|Hideyoshi]]. He retreated to Echizen Kitano‐shō and committed suicide three days later. * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 1st year ({{Gregorian calendar|qq=}} {{ill|1854|en|1854|qid=Q7670|lt=1854|1=1854}} {{ill|May 11|en|May 11|qid=Q2558|lt=May 11|1=May 11}}) – The Izu district magistrate, [[江川英龍]], completed construction of a cannon‐casting furnace in Izu Nirayama. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji|1=Meiji era}} 1st year (Intercalary April) ({{Gregorian calendar|qq=}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|June 11|en|June 11|qid=Q2617|lt=June 11|1=June 11}}) – The new Meiji government issued the Charter Oath. == Births == * {{ill|Tenpyō|en|Tenpyō|qid=Q1199879|lt=Tenpyō|1=Tenpyō}} 7th year ({{Julian calendar|qq=}} {{ill|735|en|735|qid=Q23576|lt=735|1=735}} {{ill|May 17|en|May 17|qid=Q2575|lt=May 17|1=May 17}}) – [[勝道]] (Katsumichi), a monk (died {{ill|817|en|817|qid=Q25030|lt=817|1=817}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Tenpyō|en|Tenpyō|qid=Q1199879|lt=Tenpyō|1=Tenpyō}} 20th year ({{Julian calendar|qq=}} {{ill|748|en|748|qid=Q23621|lt=748|1=748}} {{ill|May 22|en|May 22|qid=Q2581|lt=May 22|1=May 22}}) – Emperor Genshō (元正天皇), the 44th Emperor of Japan. * ({{Julian calendar|qq=}} {{ill|1135|en|1135|qid=Q19594|lt=1135|1=1135}} {{ill|June 4|en|June 4|qid=Q2627|lt=June 4|1=June 4}}) – Emperor Huizong (徽宗), the 8th Emperor of the {{ill|Song dynasty|en|Song dynasty|qid=Q7462|lt=Song dynasty|1=Song dynasty}} (born {{ill|1082|en|1082|qid=Q19452|lt=1082|1=1082}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|4|20|4|22|3|21|5|4|0421|qq=}} == References == {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:四月廿一]] {{translated page|ja|4月21日 (旧暦)|version=92939900|comment=Imported full ja history}}

[[ko:음력 4월 21일]] [[ja:4月21日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:四月廿一]]
[[ar:April 21 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:四月廿一]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:四月廿一]]
